infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Quietcare records short audio clips during a check-in so a caretaker can confirm you are okay.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Quietcare reads motion sensors to detect possible falls.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Quietcare captures a still photo when an emergency is detected so a caretaker can see the situation.
